entity.label: Zattu
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: Id., one whose descendants returned from the Captivity with Zerubbabel (Ezra 2:8; Neh. 7:13); probably the same as Zatthu.

nodes.label: Zattu
nodes.description: Id., one whose descendants returned from the Captivity with Zerubbabel (Ezra 2:8; Neh. 7:13); probably the same as Zatthu.

verses.text: The children of Zattu, nine hundred forty and five.
And of the sons of Zattu; Elioenai, Eliashib, Mattaniah, and Jeremoth, and Zabad, and Aziza.
The children of Zattu, eight hundred forty and five.
